meta.title: Talk to OKTAFORCE
meta.description: Speak with OKTAFORCE specialists and discover how our integrated ecosystem of remote concierge, AI and facilities can transform your condominium.
meta.keywords: oktaforce contact, condominium assessment, remote concierge, facilities

hero.title: Let's connect your property to the OKTAFORCE ecosystem
hero.subtitle: Fill out the form or reach us through the direct channels. We reply within one business day with a personalized initial assessment.

items.label: Address
items.value: Av. Brigadeiro Faria Lima, 2369 - Jardim Paulistano, Sao Paulo/SP

whatsapp.helper: 24/7 support from our monitoring center and technical team

form.title: Send us your information
form.subtitle: Tell us about your condominium scenario and receive a plan aligned with OKTAFORCE's latest guidelines.

message.label: Message
message.placeholder: Tell us what you want to improve with OKTAFORCE

form.success: We've received your details! Our team will get back to you shortly.
form.error: We couldn't send it right now. Try again or message us on WhatsApp.

map.title: OKTAFORCE operations center
map.description: We operate from Sao Paulo for the whole of Brazil, with scheduled visits to present our hybrid, redundant infrastructure.
